description: Discrete local linear state-space baseline fitted by one-step least squares.
notes: Validation is an open-loop rollout from x0 using the supplied pilot-command history only; good scores indicate in-distribution discrete prediction, not aerodynamic interpretability.

description: Initial-condition clustered local linear state-space models blended by scheduling weights.
notes: Fits 6 local discrete deviation models from whole local-excitation trajectory groups; rollout blends local predictions with RBF weights in state-input space, length_scale=0.92. Validation uses only x0 and the supplied pilot-command history.
